description: The Khmer Rouge was a communist-led insurgent and later ruling party in Cambodia, founded in 1951. Under Pol Pot, it ruled Cambodia from 1975 to 1979, implementing radical agrarian collectivization and autarky that led to the Cambodian genocide, killing 1.5 to 2 million people. The group continued as an insurgency until its final dissolution in 1999.

country_links.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, the Khmer Rouge was largely supported and funded by the CCP, receiving approval from CCP Chairman Mao Zedong ; it is estimated that at least 90% of the foreign aid which was provided to the Khmer Rouge came from China.
country_links.context: The Khmer Rouge was largely supported and funded by the Chinese Communist Party, receiving at least 90% of its foreign aid from China.

country_links.evidence_quote: Though North Vietnam had not been informed of the decision, its forces provided shelter and weapons to the Khmer Rouge after the insurgency started.
country_links.context: The Khmer Rouge received shelter and weapons from North Vietnam, and North Vietnamese forces launched an offensive at the Khmer Rouge's request.

country_links.evidence_quote: These Khmer Rouge bases were not self-sufficient and were funded by diamond and timber smuggling, military assistance from China channeled by means of the Thai military, and food smuggled from markets across the border in Thailand.
country_links.context: The Khmer Rouge smuggled food from markets across the border in Thailand and used Thai military to channel Chinese military assistance.

country_links.evidence_quote: a group of countries—including China, the United States, Thailand, and some other Western nations—supported the Khmer Rouge–dominated Coalition Government of Democratic Kampuchea in retaining Cambodia's seat in the United Nations
country_links.context: The United States supported the Khmer Rouge-dominated coalition government in retaining Cambodia's UN seat.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Khmer Rouge continued to fight against the Vietnamese and the government of the new People's Republic of Kampuchea until the end of the war in 1989.
country_links.context: The Khmer Rouge fought against the Vietnamese and the government of the new People's Republic of Kampuchea until the end of the war in 1989.
